nasb.text: Solomon had a vineyard at Baal-hamon; He entrusted the vineyard to caretakers. Each one was to bring a thousand shekels of silver for its fruit.

esv.text: Solomon had a vineyard at Baal-hamon; he let out the vineyard to keepers; each one was to bring for its fruit a thousand pieces of silver.

cnv.text: 所羅門在巴力．哈們有個葡萄園； 他把這葡萄園租給看守的人， 各人要為葡萄園所得的果子付一萬一千四百克銀子。

ccb.text: 所罗门在巴力·哈们有一个葡萄园， 他把葡萄园租给农夫， 租金是每人一千块银子。
